positive: A whimsical, geometric illustration of a stylized celestial sloth hanging from a crescent moon, surrounded by blooming bioluminescent jungle flora and abstract star constellations. The style is a clean, vibrant vector pop art aesthetic, utilizing strong, flat color blocks, sharp lines, and a high contrast palette of deep indigos, emerald greens, mustard yellows, and cosmic purples. The composition is perfectly centered, creating a beautiful silhouette ideal for screen printing on clothing. The lighting is stylized and dramatic, making the glowing elements pop against the darker background. Ultra high detail, graphic novel quality, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low quality, noise, watermark, signature, text, logo, anime, realistic photo, jpeg artifacts, out of frame
